title: Mbeya Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority (Water and Sewerage Charges) Order, 2002
title_en: Mbeya Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority (Water and Sewerage Charges) Order, 2002

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Mbeya Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority (Water and Sewerage Charges) Order; 2002.
An Order is hereby issued by the Managing Director that the charges prescribed in the Schedule to this Order shall come into operation on the 1 st July, 2002.

The public is hereby notified that, non-payment of sewerage services bill will result into disconnection of water supply. Schedule Water supply charges A. Metered rates No. Category New rates Tshs/M 3 1 Domestic 200.00 2 Commercial 300.00 3 Institution 460.00 4 Industrial & Irrigation 630.00 B. Flat rates No. Category New rates Tshs/month 1. Commercial 14,400.00 2. Institution 8,000.00 3. Uzunguni and other low density surveyed and un surveyed areas 7,500.00 4. Uhindini, Jacaranda, Block T and other medium Density surveyed and un surveyed areas 6,000.00 5. lyunga, Nzovwe and Ilemi (Gravity main) 5,000.00 6. Isanga, Mwakibete, lyela, Airport, Forest, Sinde, Block Q, Mabatini, Nonde, Ghana, Sokomatola, Majengo, Ilomba and other high-density areas surveyed and un surveyed 4,000.00 7. Block X and RRM 3,000.00 C. Meter rent No. Meter size Rates per month 1 2" 18,000.00 2 3" 20,000.00 3 Above 4" 50,000.00 D. Registration for new water connections No. Category Rate 1 Domestic 30,000.00 2 Commercial 40,000.00 3 Institution 40,000.00 4 Industrial 40,000.00 E. Reconnection fee No. Category Rate 1 Domestic 3,000.00 2 Commercial 5,000.00 3 Institution 5,000.00 4 Industrial 5,000.00 F. Fine for damage of water meter minimun T. Shs. 50,000.00 Sewerage services charges A. Flat rate No. Category Rate 1 Domestic 2,500.00 2 Commercial 5,000.00 3 Institution 30% of potable water bill 4 Industrial 30% of potable water bill B. Other charges (i) Registration charges 5,000.00 (ii) Construction supervision charges 25,000.00 (iii) Disposal charges 3-5 Cubic meters 1,500.00 History of this document 01 July 2004 amendment not yet applied Amended by Mbeya Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority (Water and Sewerage Charges) (Amendment) Order, 2004 19 July 2002 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 29 01 July 2002 Commenced 27 June 2002 Assented to Related documents Is amended by Mbeya Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority (Water and Sewerage Charges) (Amendment) Order, 2004 More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
